intro:
There is not enough information available about the plant Anil pruinosa, but based on some available information, I can provide some general information about the plant Anil (also known as Anisomeles). 

Anil (Anisomeles) is a flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its health benefits in relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Anil include essential oils, flavonoids, and terpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
